source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Deliberate English knowledge UI with strong display headings, stable tabular numbers, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese archive, evidence, citation, and research-management screens.
layout: Dense 8px knowledge grids, slate navigation rails, archival evidence cards, citation tables, dashboard charts, tusk-curve dividers, hide-grain texture samples, and restrained 8px cards.

prompts.label: Transparent walrus motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Walrus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated walrus motif for a design-system catalog, on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A dignified adult walrus on an arctic coast, heavy knowledgeable presence, cinnamon-brown hide with natural folds and whiskered muzzle, large ivory tusks, broad flippers, ice-grey highlights, subtle coastal frost on the body edges. The motif should feel like a "heavy knowledge system" identity: grounded, archival, deliberate, strong, and calm. The identity must read unmistakably as walrus, not seal, sea lion, elephant seal, mammoth, or polar bear.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full body visible in a compact catalog-friendly silhouette, three-quarter pose, head and tusks prominent, flippers and hide folds visible, no cropping. Clean studio-like lighting that preserves hide texture, ivory tusks, whiskers, and ice-grey highlights. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no ocean scene, no iceberg scenery, no extra animals, no human, no props, no text, no watermark, no cartoon exaggeration, no tusk jewelry, no blood, no aggressive expression, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Walrus light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Walrus", derived from an isolated walrus motif: cinnamon hide, large ivory tusks, ice-grey arctic coast, and a heavy knowledge system mood. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible knowledge dashboard UI.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, professional UI design-system presentation, dense but legible. Use large readable labels, clear section titles, and avoid tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Walrus, Walrus Tusk, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Knowledge Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from cinnamon walrus hide, ivory tusks, ice grey coastal mist, dark whisker umber, cold slate water, and heavy grounded flipper shapes. The board must read as walrus tusk and arctic coast, not generic seal, polar bear, mammoth, or nautical blue theme.
Typography: English knowledge-system UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Include documentation, archive, research, evidence, citation, and dashboard labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, evidence cards, archive tiles, citation summary, table rows, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: heavy knowledge system, deliberate archival UI, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, ivory primary actions, cinnamon hide surfaces, ice-grey backgrounds, dark umber text, slate navigation, tusk-like curved dividers, subtle hide-grain and frost texture overlays, dense but scannable dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no pirate/nautical cliché, no cartoon walrus mascot UI, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Walrus", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Walrus dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Walrus" / "Walrus Tusk". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme. It should be derived from a walrus motif with cinnamon hide, large ivory tusks, ice-grey arctic coast, and a heavy knowledge system mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, dense but legible. Keep labels large and readable.
Required visible sections: Morphous Walrus, Walrus Tusk, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Knowledge Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve tusk-ivory primary actions, cinnamon hide surfaces, frost-grey text and panels, dark whisker umber backgrounds, sea-slate navigation, evidence-teal accents, subtle hide-grain and ice-crust texture, archival knowledge cards, citation tables, dashboard metrics, command search, status chips, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as walrus tusk and arctic coast, not generic seal, polar bear, mammoth, or nautical blue theme.
Typography: English knowledge-system UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Include documentation, archive, research, evidence, citation, and dashboard labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, evidence cards, archive tiles, citation summary, table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep umber-charcoal background, cinnamon dark panels, tusk-ivory active states, ice-grey surfaces, frost text, evidence-teal focus rings, muted amber warning chips, thin tusk-curve separators, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards, tactile hide-grain overlays.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic black-and-orange gaming UI, no pure-black flat background, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no pirate/nautical cliché, no cartoon walrus mascot UI, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Walrus", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
